top_signals.title: Chip Stocks Lead Selloff as Investors Question AI Assumptions
top_signals.summary: Tech stocks are selling off and there’s no sign of any letup. A new AI model from a Chinese startup is one contributing factor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
